every color imaginable — magenta dahlias, cobalt hydrangeas, golden sunflowers, blush peonies, violet irises, and scarlet geraniums

cool blues and purples — lavender wisteria, indigo delphiniums, periwinkle hydrangeas, violet clematis, and pale blue morning glories

greens and whites — white gardenias, cream magnolias, pale green hellebores, white lilacs, and ivory tuberose with deep green foliage
hydrangeas in every shade — cobalt blue, dusty pink, deep purple, snow white, and sage green clusters massed together
roses in full spectrum — blood red, peach, butter yellow, snow white, deep pink, and lavender all intermixed
hibiscus rainbow — scarlet, coral, golden yellow, hot pink, white, and deep orange blooms scattered throughout
pure white jasmine vines blanketing every surface, thousands of tiny star-shaped blooms releasing intoxicating fragrance
endless purple wisteria hanging in curtains from every iron rib, cascading like violet waterfalls
nothing but deep red roses — hundreds of velvety crimson blooms packed impossibly dense in towering arrangements

tulips in jewel tones — ruby red, emerald-striped, amethyst purple, sapphire blue, and topaz orange standing in perfect rows
carnations bursting forth — burgundy, hot pink, white with red edges, pale yellow, and deep coral ruffled blooms
fiery autumn display — rust-colored chrysanthemums, burgundy celosia, burnt orange marigolds, golden calendula, and bronze coleus
endless fields of golden sunflowers, each head the size of a dinner plate, petals gleaming like polished brass
lilac symphony — deep purple lilacs, white lilacs, pale lavender lilacs, and magenta lilacs in fragrant towering pyramids
wildflower meadow bursting with blue cornflowers, red clover, white Queen Anne's lace, yellow black-eyed Susans, and purple asters
